target: Choose release, hold, or escalate for synthetic segment S-9 under the disclosed rule.
public_context: Synthetic rule: release only when bot-adjusted 30-day retention is at least 10% and eligible sample size is at least 500. The visible dashboard reports raw retention 12% and 1,000 rows, but raw and eligible values are not controlling. Evidence-request budget is 3.

evidence_atoms.content: retention_30d_raw includes automated accounts; decisions require retention_30d_bot_adjusted.
S-9 bot-adjusted retention is 8%; eligible sample size is 720.
Owner confirms the displayed 12% is raw and should not drive release.
